option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
{{ dialogTitle() }}

@if (isEditMode()) { Update your recurring transaction schedule } @else { Set up a recurring transaction to automate your finances }

@if (isInvalid('description')) { Description is required (minimum 3 characters). }
@if (isInvalid('amount')) { Amount must be greater than 0. }
@if (showInterval() || showDaysOfWeek() || showDayOfMonth()) {
@if (showInterval()) { } @if (showDaysOfWeek()) { } @if (showDayOfMonth()) { }
}
@if (isInvalid('startDate')) { Start date is required. }
@if (showMaxOccurrences()) { }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
{{ dialogTitle() }}

@if (isEditMode()) { Update your recurring transaction schedule } @else { Set up a recurring transaction to automate your finances }

@if (isInvalid('description')) { Description is required (minimum 3 characters). }
@if (isInvalid('amount')) { Amount must be greater than 0. }
@if (showInterval() || showDaysOfWeek() || showDayOfMonth()) {
@if (showInterval()) { } @if (showDaysOfWeek()) { } @if (showDayOfMonth()) { }
}
@if (isInvalid('startDate')) { Start date is required. }
@if (showMaxOccurrences()) { }
